# Repository Agents

This folder defines specialized repository agents for SvelteKit + Paraglide workflows.

## Agents

- `sveltekit-compliance.agent.md`: Routing, load patterns, SSR boundaries, and architecture compliance.
- `security-review.agent.md`: Security hardening for server/client boundaries, validation, and sensitive data handling.
- `paraglide-i18n.agent.md`: Paraglide-first i18n implementation and locale flow correctness.
- `import-hygiene.agent.md`: Import clarity, alias usage, dependency boundaries, and cycle prevention.
- `lint-compliance.agent.md`: ESLint and code-quality compliance with maintainable fixes.

## Usage Intent

Use these agents during code review, refactoring, or PR hardening to enforce repository standards defined in `AGENTS.md`.
